First, we show that providing contrastive image sets to VLMs yields candidate labels that are more specific and more faithful. Second, we introduce Contrastive Semantic Projection (CSP), an extension of SemanticLens that incorporates contrastive examples directly into its CLIP-based scoring and selection pipeline. Across extensive experiments and a case study on melanoma detection, contrastive labeling improves both faithfulness and semantic granularity over state-of-the-art baselines. Our results demonstrate that contrastive examples are a simple yet powerful and currently underutilized component of neuron labeling and analysis pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对比图像的神经元标注方法，通过使用对比示例显著提升了标注的保真度和语义粒度。
AI.motivation: 现有神经元标注方法通常依赖高激活示例，容易产生过于宽泛或误导性的标签，因为它们往往关注主导但偶然的视觉因素。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：(1)向视觉语言模型提供对比图像集生成候选标签；(2)引入对比语义投影(CSP)，将对比示例集成到基于CLIP的评分和选择流程中。
AI.result: 实验和黑色素瘤检测案例研究表明，对比标注比现有基线方法更好地提升了保真度和语义粒度。
AI.conclusion: 对比示例是神经元标注和分析流程中简单而强大且当前未被充分利用的组件，能够产生更准确、更具体的神经元标签。

title: Representational Harms in LLM-Generated Narratives Against Global Majority Nationalities
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for text generation tasks from everyday use to high-stakes enterprise and government applications, including simulated interviews with asylum seekers. While many works highlight the new potential applications of LLMs, there are risks of LLMs encoding and perpetuating harmful biases about non-dominant communities across the globe. To better evaluate and mitigate such harms, more research examining how LLMs portray diverse individuals is needed. In this work, we study how national origin identities are portrayed by widely-adopted LLMs in response to open-ended narrative generation prompts. Our findings demonstrate the presence of persistent representational harms by national origin, including harmful stereotypes, erasure, and one-dimensional portrayals of Global Majority identities. Minoritized national identities are simultaneously underrepresented in power-neutral stories and overrepresented in subordinated character portrayals, which are over fifty times more likely to appear than dominant portrayals. The degree of harm is amplified when US nationality cues (e.g., ``American'') are present in input prompts. Notably, we find that the harms we identify cannot be explained away via sycophancy, as US-centric biases persist even when replacing US nationality cues with non-US national identities in the prompts. Based on our findings, we call for further exploration of cultural harms in LLMs through methodologies that center Global Majority perspectives and challenge the uncritical adoption of US-based LLMs for the classification, surveillance, and misrepresentation of the majority of our planet.

AI.tldr: 研究发现广泛使用的大型语言模型在开放性叙事生成中持续存在基于国别的表征伤害，包括刻板印象、忽视和对全球多数群体的片面描述。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM被广泛应用于从日常到高风险的各种场景（如政府的避难申请者模拟面试），需要研究LLM如何表征不同国别身份，以评估和减轻其对非主导群体的潜在偏见伤害。
AI.method: 通过向主流LLMs输入开放性叙事生成提示，分析其对不同国别身份的表征模式，特别关注全球多数群体的描述是否存在偏见和伤害。
AI.result: 发现LLM存在持续的表征伤害，包括有害刻板印象、忽视和片面描述。少数群体国别身份在权力中性故事中代表性不足，但在从属角色描述中过度代表（比主导角色描述多50倍）。当输入包含美国国籍提示时伤害程度加剧，且这种以美国为中心的偏见无法用迎合性解释。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁通过以全球多数群体视角为中心的方法论进一步探索LLM中的文化伤害，并挑战在分类、监控和错误表征全球大多数人方面不加批判地采用基于美国的LLMs。

title: Improving Driver Drowsiness Detection via Personalized EAR/MAR Thresholds and CNN-Based Classification
summary: Driver drowsiness is a major cause of traffic accidents worldwide, posing a serious threat to public safety. Vision-based driver monitoring systems often rely on fixed Eye Aspect Ratio (EAR) and Mouth Aspect Ratio (MAR) thresholds; however, such fixed values frequently fail to generalize across individuals due to variations in facial structure, illumination, and driving conditions. This paper proposes a personalized driver drowsiness detection system that monitors eyelid movements, head position, and yawning behavior in real time and provides warnings when signs of fatigue are detected. The system employs driver-specific EAR and MAR thresholds, calibrated before driving, to improve classical metric-based detection. In addition, deep learning-based Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models are integrated to enhance accuracy in challenging scenarios. The system is evaluated using publicly available datasets as well as a custom dataset collected under diverse lighting conditions, head poses, and user characteristics. Experimental results show that personalized thresholding improves detection accuracy by 2-3% compared to fixed thresholds, while CNN-based classification achieves 99.1% accuracy for eye state detection and 98.8% for yawning detection, demonstrating the effectiveness of combining classical metrics with deep learning for robust real-time driver monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种个性化的驾驶员嗜睡检测系统，通过校准个体特定的EAR和MAR阈值并结合CNN深度学习模型，在多种驾驶场景下实现了高精度的实时疲劳监测。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于视觉的驾驶员监控系统使用固定的EAR和MAR阈值，但由于面部结构差异、光照条件和驾驶环境的变化，这些固定值往往无法在不同个体间实现良好的泛化效果，导致检测准确性不足。
AI.method: 系统结合了改进的经典指标和深度学习方法：1)在驾驶前校准驾驶员特定的EAR和MAR阈值；2)整合CNN模型用于眼部状态和哈欠检测；3)实时监测眼睑运动、头部位置和打哈欠行为，检测到疲劳迹象时发出警告。在公开数据集和包含多样化光照条件、头部姿态及用户特征的自定义数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 个性化阈值相比固定阈值将检测准确率提升2-3%，CNN分类器在眼部状态检测和哈欠检测上分别达到99.1%和98.8%的准确率，证明了结合经典指标与深度学习方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将个性化阈值校准与深度学习相结合的方法能够显著提升驾驶员嗜睡检测的鲁棒性和准确性，为实时驾驶监控系统提供了一种可靠的解决方案。

title: How Do AI Agents Spend Your Money? Analyzing and Predicting Token Consumption in Agentic Coding Tasks
summary: The wide adoption of AI agents in complex human workflows is driving rapid growth in LLM token consumption. When agents are deployed on tasks that require a significant amount of tokens, three questions naturally arise: (1) Where do AI agents spend the tokens? (2) Which models are more token-efficient? and (3) Can agents predict their token usage before task execution? In this paper, we present the first systematic study of token consumption patterns in agentic coding tasks. We analyze trajectories from eight frontier LLMs on SWE-bench Verified and evaluate models' ability to predict their own token costs before task execution. We find that: (1) agentic tasks are uniquely expensive, consuming 1000x more tokens than code reasoning and code chat, with input tokens rather than output tokens driving the overall cost; (2) token usage is highly variable and inherently stochastic: runs on the same task can differ by up to 30x in total tokens, and higher token usage does not translate into higher accuracy; instead, accuracy often peaks at intermediate cost and saturates at higher costs; (3) models vary substantially in token efficiency: on the same tasks, Kimi-K2 and Claude-Sonnet-4.5, on average, consume over 1.5 million more tokens than GPT-5; (4) task difficulty rated by human experts only weakly aligns with actual token costs, revealing a fundamental gap between human-perceived complexity and the computational effort agents actually expend; and (5) frontier models fail to accurately predict their own token usage (with weak-to-moderate correlations, up to 0.39) and systematically underestimate real token costs. Our study offers new insights into the economics of AI agents and can inspire future research in this direction.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次系统分析了AI代理在编程任务中的令牌消耗模式，发现代理任务令牌消耗极高且波动巨大，不同模型效率差异显著，且模型无法准确预测自身令牌使用量。
AI.motivation: 随着AI代理在复杂人类工作流程中的广泛应用，LLM令牌消耗快速增长。针对需要大量令牌的任务，需要回答三个核心问题：代理将令牌花费在哪里？哪些模型更令牌高效？代理能否在任务执行前预测令牌使用量？
AI.method: 研究分析了8个前沿LLM在SWE-bench Verified基准上的执行轨迹，评估模型在任务执行前预测自身令牌成本的能力，通过对比不同模型、不同任务的令牌消耗模式进行系统性研究。
AI.result: 主要发现包括：(1)代理任务令牌消耗极高，比代码推理和聊天多1000倍，主要由输入令牌驱动；(2)令牌使用高度变异且具有随机性，相同任务可相差30倍，更高令牌使用不一定带来更高准确性；(3)模型效率差异巨大，Kimi-K2和Claude-Sonnet-4.5比GPT-5平均多消耗150万令牌；(4)人类评估的任务难度与实际令牌成本相关性较弱；(5)前沿模型无法准确预测自身令牌使用，相关系数最高仅0.39且系统性低估。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为AI代理的经济学提供了新的见解，揭示了人类感知复杂性与代理实际计算努力之间的根本差距，可启发未来相关研究方向。

title: Holo360D: A Large-Scale Real-World Dataset with Continuous Trajectories for Advancing Panoramic 3D Reconstruction and Beyond
summary: While feed-forward 3D reconstruction models have advanced rapidly, they still exhibit degraded performance on panoramas due to spherical distortions. Moreover, existing panoramic 3D datasets are predominantly collected with 360 cameras fixed at discrete locations, resulting in discontinuous trajectories. These limitations critically hinder the development of panoramic feed-forward 3D reconstruction, especially for the multi-view setting. In this paper, we present Holo360D, a comprehensive dataset containing 109,495 panoramas paired with registered point clouds, meshes, and aligned camera poses. To our knowledge, Holo360D is the first large-scale dataset that provides continuous panoramic sequences with accurately aligned high-completeness depth maps. The raw data are initially collected using a 3D laser scanner coupled with a 360 camera. Subsequently, the raw data are processed with both online and offline SLAM systems. Furthermore, to enhance the 3D data quality, a post-processing pipeline tailored for the 360 dataset is proposed, including geometry denoising, mesh hole filling, and region-specific remeshing. Finally, we establish a new benchmark by fine-tuning 3D reconstruction models on Holo360D, providing key insights into effective fine-tuning strategies. Our results demonstrate that Holo360D delivers superior training signals and provides a comprehensive benchmark for advancing panoramic 3D reconstruction models. Datasets and Code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Holo360D，一个包含109,495个全景图像和对应3D数据的大规模数据集，为全景3D重建提供了连续轨迹和高质量深度图，并建立了新的评估基准。
AI.motivation: 现有的前馈3D重建模型在全景图像上性能下降，主要受球面畸变影响；同时，现有全景3D数据集相机位置离散、轨迹不连续，严重阻碍了全景3D重建特别是多视角设置的发展。
AI.method: 使用3D激光扫描器结合360相机采集原始数据，通过在线和离线SLAM系统处理，提出专门针对360数据集的后处理流程，包括几何去噪、网格孔洞填充和区域特定重网格化。
AI.result: Holo360D数据集提供了连续的全景序列和精确对齐的高完整性深度图，在Holo360D上微调的3D重建模型显示出优异性能，为全景3D重建模型发展提供了有效基准。
AI.conclusion: Holo360D是首个提供连续全景序列和高质量3D数据的大规模数据集，为全景3D重建研究提供了重要资源，推动了该领域的发展。数据集和代码将公开发布。

title: CGC: Compositional Grounded Contrast for Fine-Grained Multi-Image Understanding
summary: Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have advanced rapidly, they still face notable challenges in fine-grained multi-image understanding, often exhibiting spatial hallucination, attention leakage, and failures in object constancy. In addition, existing approaches typically rely on expensive human annotations or large-scale chain-of-thought (CoT) data generation. We propose Compositional Grounded Contrast (abbr. CGC), a low-cost full framework for boosting fine-grained multi-image understanding of MLLMs. Built on existing single-image grounding annotations, CGC constructs compositional multi-image training instances through Inter-Image Contrast and Intra-Image Contrast, which introduce semantically decoupled distractor contexts for cross-image discrimination and correlated cross-view samples for object constancy, respectively. CGC further introduces a Rule-Based Spatial Reward within the GRPO framework to improve source-image attribution, spatial alignment, and structured output validity under a Think-before-Grounding paradigm. Experiments show that CGC achieves state-of-the-art results on fine-grained multi-image benchmarks, including MIG-Bench and VLM2-Bench. The learned multi-image understanding capability also transfers to broader multimodal understanding and reasoning tasks, yielding consistent gains over the Qwen3-VL-8B base model on MathVista (+2.90), MuirBench (+2.88), MMStar (+1.93), MMMU (+1.77), and BLINK (+1.69).

AI.tldr: CGC是一个低成本框架，通过对比学习和空间奖励机制提升多模态大模型的细粒度多图像理解能力，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态大模型在细粒度多图像理解方面存在空间幻觉、注意力泄漏和对象恒常性失败等问题，且传统方法依赖昂贵的人工标注或大规模思维链数据生成。
AI.method: CGC基于单图像标注构建组合多图像训练实例，通过跨图像对比引入语义解耦的干扰上下文，通过图像内对比提供相关跨视图样本，并在GRPO框架内引入基于规则的空间奖励机制。
AI.result: 在MIG-Bench和VLM2-Bench等细粒度多图像基准测试中达到SOTA，同时在MathVista、MuirBench、MMStar、MMMU和BLINK等多个任务中实现一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: CGC证明了利用现有单图像标注和对比学习方法可以有效提升多模态模型的多图像理解能力，具有良好的泛化性能和实用价值。

title: ICPR 2026 Competition on Low-Resolution License Plate Recognition
comment: Accepted for presentation at the International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2026
summary: Low-Resolution License Plate Recognition (LRLPR) remains a challenging problem in real-world surveillance scenarios, where long capture distances, compression artifacts, and adverse imaging conditions can severely degrade license plate legibility. To promote progress in this area, we organized the ICPR 2026 Competition on Low-Resolution License Plate Recognition, the first competition specifically dedicated to LRLPR using real low-quality data collected under operationally relevant conditions. The competition was based on the LRLPR-26 dataset, which comprises 20,000 training tracks and 3,000 test tracks; each training track contains five low-resolution and five high-resolution images of the same license plate. Notably, a total of 269 teams from 41 countries registered for the competition, and 99 teams submitted valid entries in the Blind Test Phase. The winning team achieved a Recognition Rate of 82.13%, and four teams surpassed the 80% mark, highlighting both the high level of competition at the top of the leaderboard and the continued difficulty of the task. In addition to presenting the competition design, evaluation protocol, and main results, this paper summarizes the methods adopted by the top-5 teams and discusses current trends and promising directions for future research on LRLPR. The competition webpage is available at https://icpr26lrlpr.github.io/

AI.tldr: ICPR 2026举办了首个低分辨率车牌识别竞赛，使用真实场景数据集，99个团队参赛，冠军团队识别率达82.13%。
AI.motivation: 解决现实监控场景中低分辨率车牌识别的挑战性问题，推动该领域技术发展。由于拍摄距离远、压缩伪影和恶劣成像条件等因素，车牌可读性严重降低。
AI.method: 组织基于LRLPR-26数据集的竞赛，包含2万训练轨迹和3千测试轨迹，每个轨迹包含5张低分辨率和5张高分辨率车牌图像。采用盲测试阶段评估方法。
AI.result: 269个团队注册，99个团队提交有效结果。冠军团队识别率82.13%，4个团队超过80%，展现了高水平的竞争效果，同时表明该任务仍具有挑战性。
AI.conclusion: 竞赛成功推动了低分辨率车牌识别研究，总结了top5团队的方法，为未来LRLPR研究提供了有价值的经验和方向。

title: Railway Artificial Intelligence Learning Benchmark (RAIL-BENCH): A Benchmark Suite for Perception in the Railway Domain
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables, submitted at 2026 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots & Systems
summary: Automated train operation on existing railway infrastructure requires robust camera-based perception, yet the railway domain lacks public benchmark suites with standardized evaluation protocols that would enable reproducible comparison of approaches. We present RAIL-BENCH, the first perception benchmark suite for the railway domain. It comprises five challenges - rail track detection, object detection, vegetation segmentation, multi-object tracking, and monocular visual odometry - each tailored to the specific characteristics of railway environments. RAIL-BENCH provides curated training and test datasets drawn from diverse real-world scenarios, evaluation metrics, and public scoreboards (https://www.mrt.kit.edu/railbench). For the rail track detection challenge we introduce LineAP, a novel segment-based average precision metric that evaluates the geometric accuracy of polyline predictions independently of instance-level grouping, addressing key limitations of existing line detection metrics.

AI.tldr: RAIL-BENCH是首个铁路感知基准套件，包含轨道检测、目标检测、植被分割、多目标跟踪和单目视觉里程计五个挑战，并提出了LineAP新指标评估几何精度。
AI.motivation: 现有铁路基础设施的自动化列车操作需要鲁棒的相机感知系统，但铁路领域缺乏具有标准化评估协议的公开基准套件，无法实现方法间的可重现比较。
AI.method: 构建RAIL-BENCH基准套件，包含五个针对铁路环境的特定挑战；提供精选的训练和测试数据集、评估指标和公共排行榜；针对轨道检测引入基于段的平均精度指标LineAP。
AI.result: 建立了完整的铁路感知评估平台，解决了现有线路检测指标的关键局限性，为铁路感知算法提供了标准化比较框架。
AI.conclusion: RAIL-BENCH填补了铁路感知领域基准套件的空白，通过标准化评估和公开平台促进了该领域的研究发展和算法比较。

title: Different Strokes for Different Folks: Writer Identification for Historical Arabic Manuscripts
summary: Handwritten Arabic manuscripts preserve the Arab world's intellectual and cultural heritage, and writer identification supports provenance, authenticity verification, and historical analysis. Using the Muharaf dataset of historical Arabic manuscripts, we evaluate writer identification from individual line images and, to the best of our knowledge, provide the first baselines reported under both line-level and page-disjoint evaluation protocols. Since the dataset is only partially labeled for writer identification, we manually verified and expanded writer labels in the public portion from 6,858 (28.00%) to 21,249 lines (86.75%) out of 24,495 line images, correcting inconsistencies and removing non-handwritten text. After further filtering, we retained 18,987 lines (77.51%). We propose a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)-based model with attention mechanisms for closed-set writer identification, including rare two-writer lines modeled as composite writer-pair classes. We benchmark fourteen configurations and conduct ablations across different feature extractors and training regimes. To assess generalization to unseen pages, the page-disjoint protocol assigns all lines from each page to a single split. Under the line-level protocol, a fine-tuned DenseNet201 with attention achieves 99.05% Top-1 accuracy, 99.73% Top-5 accuracy, and 97.44% F1-score. Under the more challenging page-disjoint protocol, the best observed results are 78.61% Top-1 accuracy, 87.79% Top-5 accuracy, and 66.55% F1-score, thus quantifying the impact of page-level cues. By expanding the Muharaf dataset's labeled subset and reporting both protocols, we provide a clearer benchmark and a practical resource for historians and linguists engaged with culturally and historically significant documents. The code and implementation details are available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文基于Muharaf阿拉伯语手稿数据集，通过扩充标签和提出带注意力机制的CNN模型，首次实现了行级和页面级两种评估协议下的作者识别基准测试，为历史文档分析提供了重要资源。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯语手写稿保存了阿拉伯世界的知识和文化遗产，作者识别对于文档来源追溯、真实性验证和历史分析至关重要。然而现有数据集标注不完整，且缺乏标准评估协议。
AI.method: 1) 手动验证并扩充Muharaf数据集的作者标签，从6,858条扩充到21,249条；2) 提出基于CNN的注意力机制模型，将罕见双作者行建模为复合作者对类别；3) 设计行级和页面级两种评估协议，其中页面级将同一页面所有行分配到同一划分；4) 进行14种配置的对比实验和消融研究。
AI.result: 行级协议下，微调DenseNet201+注意力模型达到99.05% Top-1准确率、99.73% Top-5准确率和97.44% F1分数；更具挑战性的页面级协议下，最好结果为78.61% Top-1准确率、87.79% Top-5准确率和66.55% F1分数，量化了页面级线索的影响。
AI.conclusion: 通过扩展Muharaf数据集标注并建立两种评估协议，本文为历史学家和语言学家处理重要文化历史文档提供了更清晰的基准和实用资源，推动了阿拉伯语手稿作者识别研究的发展。

title: Non-Minimal Sampling and Consensus for Prohibitively Large Datasets
summary: We introduce NONSAC (Non-Minimal Sampling and Consensus), a general framework for robust and scalable model estimation from arbitrarily large datasets contaminated with noise and outliers. NONSAC repeatedly samples non-minimal subsets of data and generates model hypotheses using a robust estimator, producing multiple candidate models. The final model is selected based on a predefined scoring rule that evaluates hypothesis quality. Our framework is estimator-agnostic and can be integrated with existing geometric fitting algorithms such as RANSAC to improve both scalability and robustness to outliers. We propose and evaluate various scoring rules for NONSAC on relative camera pose estimation, Perspective-n-Point, and point cloud registration. Furthermore, we showcase the applicability of NONSAC to correspondence-free point cloud registration by hypothesizing all-to-all correspondences.

AI.tldr: NONSAC是一个通过非最小子采样和共识机制的鲁棒模型估计框架，能够高效处理大规模含噪数据集，并可与RANSAC等现有算法结合提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的鲁棒估计方法（如RANSAC）在处理大规模数据集时面临计算效率和鲁棒性挑战，需要一种更通用、可扩展的框架来处理噪声和异常值。
AI.method: NONSAC通过重复采样非最小数据子集，使用鲁棒估计器生成多个候选模型，并基于预定义的评分规则选择最优模型。该框架与具体估计器无关，可与现有几何拟合算法集成。
AI.result: 在相机位姿估计、PnP和点云配准等任务上验证了NONSAC的有效性，并展示了其在无对应点云配准中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: NONSAC为大规模鲁棒模型估计提供了一个灵活且高效的解决方案，能够同时提升算法的可扩展性和对异常值的鲁棒性。

title: Distilling Vision Transformers for Distortion-Robust Representation Learning
summary: Self-supervised learning has achieved remarkable success in learning visual representations from clean data, yet remains challenging when clean observations are sparse or not available at all. In this paper, we demonstrate that pretrained vision models can be leveraged to learn distortion-robust representations, which can then be effectively applied to downstream tasks operating on distorted observations. In particular, we propose an asymmetric knowledge distillation framework in which both teacher and student are initialized from the same pretrained Vision Transformer but receive different views of each image: the teacher processes clean images, while the student sees their distorted versions. We introduce multi-level distillation that aligns global embeddings, patch-level features, and attention maps and show that the student is able to approximate clean-image representations despite never directly accessing clean data. We evaluate our approach on image classification tasks across several datasets and under various distortions, consistently outperforming existing alternatives for the same amount of human supervision.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种非对称知识蒸馏框架，利用预训练视觉模型学习对图像畸变鲁棒的特征表示，学生模型仅通过畸变图像学习就能接近处理干净图像教师模型的表示能力。
AI.motivation: 当干净观测数据稀疏或不可用时，自监督学习在视觉表示学习方面面临挑战。实际应用中常遇到各种图像畸变，影响了模型性能，因此需要学习对畸变鲁棒的表示方法。
AI.method: 提出非对称知识蒸馏框架，教师和学生模型均初始化自同一预训练视觉Transformer，但处理不同视图：教师处理干净图像，学生处理畸变图像。引入多层蒸馏策略，对齐全局嵌入、块级特征和注意力图。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和各种畸变条件下的图像分类任务评估表明，该方法在相同人类监督量下持续优于现有替代方案，学生模型能够在未直接接触干净数据的情况下近似干净图像表示。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用预训练模型和多层知识蒸馏，可以有效地从畸变数据中学习鲁棒的视觉表示，为处理现实世界中存在数据质量问题的场景提供了有效解决方案。

title: Evolving Thematic Map Design in Academic Cartography: A Thirty-Year Study Based on Multilingual Journals
summary: Thematic maps play a central role in academic communication, yet their large-scale design evolution has rarely been examined empirically. This study presents a longitudinal and multilingual analysis of thematic map design practices in academic cartography from 1990 to 2020. We compile a corpus of 45,732 research articles from sixteen authoritative Chinese- and English-language journals and extract 23,928 maps using computer vision and large-model-based document parsing to build a structured dataset. Map design characteristics are quantified across three dimensions: map elements, color design, and layout structure. Results show that Chinese- and Englishlanguage academic maps share highly similar structural conventions, typically employing restrained color palettes with neutral dominant hues, low saturation, high brightness, and limited hue diversity, as well as centered layouts with high main-map occupation ratios. Differences exist in that English-language maps show slightly greater hue richness and compactness, whereas Chinese-language maps historically rely more on neutral hues and integrated layouts. Temporal analysis reveals parallel evolutionary trends in both groups, including increasing element richness, legend usage, and hue diversity, alongside stable layout structures. Overall, the findings suggest that academic map design evolution is characterized more by institutional convergence than cultural divergence.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过分析1990-2020年间中英文学术期刊中的23,928张主题地图，发现学术地图设计具有高度相似的结构惯例，且发展呈现趋同而非分化的特征。
AI.motivation: 主题地图在学术传播中占据核心地位，但对其大规模设计演化趋势缺乏实证研究。本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过多语言视角分析学术制图实践的发展规律。
AI.method: 研究人员构建了来自16种权威中英文期刊的45,732篇研究文章语料库，使用计算机视觉和基于大模型的文档解析技术提取23,928张地图。从地图要素、色彩设计和布局结构三个维度量化地图设计特征。
AI.result: 中英文学术地图共享高度相似的结构惯例，均采用克制的中性主导色调、低饱和度、高亮度和有限色调多样性，以及中心化布局和较高主图占比。差异在于英文地图色调丰富度和紧凑度略高，中文地图传统上更依赖中性色调和整合布局。时序分析显示两组呈现并行演化趋势，包括要素丰富性、图例使用和色调多样性增加，布局结构保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，学术地图设计演化更多表现为制度趋同而非文化分化的特征，为理解学术制图实践的发展模式提供了重要见解。

title: ReLIC-SGG: Relation Lattice Completion for Open-Vocabulary Scene Graph Generation
summary: Open-vocabulary scene graph generation (SGG) aims to describe visual scenes with flexible relation phrases beyond a fixed predicate set. Existing methods usually treat annotated triplets as positives and all unannotated object-pair relations as negatives. However, scene graph annotations are inherently incomplete: many valid relations are missing, and the same interaction can be described at different granularities, e.g., \textit{on}, \textit{standing on}, \textit{resting on}, and \textit{supported by}. This issue becomes more severe in open-vocabulary SGG due to the much larger relation space. We propose \textbf{ReLIC-SGG}, a relation-incompleteness-aware framework that treats unannotated relations as latent variables rather than definite negatives. ReLIC-SGG builds a semantic relation lattice to model similarity, entailment, and contradiction among open-vocabulary predicates, and uses it to infer missing positive relations from visual-language compatibility, graph context, and semantic consistency. A positive-unlabeled graph learning objective further reduces false-negative supervision, while lattice-guided decoding produces compact and semantically consistent scene graphs. Experiments on conventional, open-vocabulary, and panoptic SGG benchmarks show that ReLIC-SGG improves rare and unseen predicate recognition and better recovers missing relations.

AI.tldr: ReLIC-SGG是一个开放词汇场景图生成框架，通过构建语义关系格来建模谓词间的关系，并将未标注关系视为潜在变量而非绝对负例，有效解决了标注不完整问题。
AI.motivation: 现有场景图生成方法将所有未标注的对象对关系视为负例，但场景图标注本身就不完整 - 许多有效关系缺失，且同一交互可以用不同粒度描述，这在开放词汇场景图中更加严重。
AI.method: 构建语义关系格来建模开放词汇谓词间的相似性、蕴含和矛盾关系；利用视觉-语言兼容性、图上下文和语义一致性推断缺失的正向关系；采用正例-未标注图学习目标减少假负监督；通过格引导解码生成紧凑且语义一致的场景图。
AI.result: 在传统、开放词汇和全景场景图基准测试上，ReLIC-SGG改善了稀有和未见谓词的识别，并能更好地恢复缺失关系。
AI.conclusion: 通过关系不完整性感知和语义关系格建模，ReLIC-SGG有效解决了开放词汇场景图生成中的标注不完整问题，在多个基准测试上取得了显著改进。

title: Transferable Physical-World Adversarial Patches Against Pedestrian Detection Models
summary: Physical adversarial patch attacks critically threaten pedestrian detection, causing surveillance and autonomous driving systems to miss pedestrians and creating severe safety risks. Despite their effectiveness in controlled settings, existing physical attacks face two major limitations in practice: they lack systematic disruption of the multi-stage decision pipeline, enabling residual modules to offset perturbations, and they fail to model complex physical variations, leading to poor robustness. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel pedestrian adversarial patch generation method that combines multi-stage collaborative attacks with robustness enhancement under physical diversity, called TriPatch. Specifically, we design a triplet loss consisting of detection confidence suppression, bounding-box offset amplification, and non-maximum suppression (NMS) disruption, which jointly act across different stages of the detection pipeline. In addition, we introduce an appearance consistency loss to constrain the color distribution of the patch, thereby improving its adaptability under diverse imaging conditions, and incorporate data augmentation to further enhance robustness against complex physical perturbations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TriPatch achieves a higher attack success rate across multiple detector models compared to existing approaches.

AI.tldr: TriPatch是一种新型行人对抗补丁生成方法，通过多阶段协同攻击和物理鲁棒性增强，在多种检测器上实现了更高的攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有的物理对抗补丁攻击在实际应用中存在两个主要限制：缺乏对多阶段决策流程的系统性干扰，无法有效破坏检测器的完整流程；以及对复杂物理变化的建模不足，导致鲁棒性差。
AI.method: 提出TriPatch方法，结合多阶段协同攻击与物理多样性下的鲁棒性增强。设计包含检测置信度抑制、边界框偏移放大和非极大值抑制(NMS)破坏的三元组损失，在检测流程的不同阶段联合作用。引入外观一致性损失约束补丁颜色分布，并采用数据增强进一步提升对复杂物理扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验证明，与现有方法相比，TriPatch在多个检测器模型上实现了更高的攻击成功率。
AI.conclusion: TriPatch通过多阶段协同攻击和物理鲁棒性增强策略，有效提升了对抗补丁在真实环境中的攻击效果，为物理对抗攻击研究提供了新的思路。

title: Video Analysis and Generation via a Semantic Progress Function
summary: Transformations produced by image and video generation models often evolve in a highly non-linear manner: long stretches where the content barely changes are followed by sudden, abrupt semantic jumps. To analyze and correct this behavior, we introduce a Semantic Progress Function, a one-dimensional representation that captures how the meaning of a given sequence evolves over time. For each frame, we compute distances between semantic embeddings and fit a smooth curve that reflects the cumulative semantic shift across the sequence. Departures of this curve from a straight line reveal uneven semantic pacing. Building on this insight, we propose a semantic linearization procedure that reparameterizes (or retimes) the sequence so that semantic change unfolds at a constant rate, yielding smoother and more coherent transitions. Beyond linearization, our framework provides a model-agnostic foundation for identifying temporal irregularities, comparing semantic pacing across different generators, and steering both generated and real-world video sequences toward arbitrary target pacing.

AI.tldr: 提出语义进度函数分析生成内容的时间演化规律，通过语义线性化技术实现语义变化的均匀分布，提升生成质量和连贯性。
AI.motivation: 图像和视频生成模型产生的变换呈现高度非线性特征，长时间缓慢变化后突然出现语义跳跃，这种不均匀的语义节奏影响了生成内容的连贯性和质量。
AI.method: 引入语义进度函数作为一维表示，通过计算语义嵌入距离并拟合平滑曲线来捕捉序列的语义演化；基于此提出语义线性化过程，重新参数化序列使语义变化速率恒定。
AI.result: 语义线性化能够产生更平滑、更连贯的转换效果；该框架提供了模型无关的基础方法，可用于识别时间不规则性、比较不同生成器的语义节奏，并引导视频序列达到目标节奏。
AI.conclusion: 语义进度函数为生成内容的语义演化提供了量化分析工具，语义线性化技术有效解决了非线性语义变化问题，为视频生成和分析提供了新的方法论基础。

title: Cross-Stage Coherence in Hierarchical Driving VQA: Explicit Baselines and Learned Gated Context Projectors
summary: Graph Visual Question Answering (GVQA) for autonomous driving organizes reasoning into ordered stages, namely Perception, Prediction, and Planning, where planning decisions should remain consistent with the model's own perception. We present a comparative study of cross-stage context passing on DriveLM-nuScenes using two complementary mechanisms. The explicit variant evaluates three prompt-based conditioning strategies on a domain-adapted 4B VLM (Mini-InternVL2-4B-DA-DriveLM) without additional training, reducing NLI contradiction by up to 42.6% and establishing a strong zero-training baseline. The implicit variant introduces gated context projectors, which extract a hidden-state vector from one stage and inject a normalized, gated projection into the next stage's input embeddings. These projectors are jointly trained with stage-specific QLoRA adapters on a general-purpose 8B VLM (InternVL3-8B-Instruct) while updating only approximately 0.5% of parameters. The implicit variant achieves a statistically significant 34% reduction in planning-stage NLI contradiction (bootstrap 95% CIs, p < 0.05) and increases cross-stage entailment by 50%, evaluated with a multilingual NLI classifier to account for mixed-language outputs. Planning language quality also improves (CIDEr +30.3%), but lexical overlap and structural consistency degrade due to the absence of driving-domain pretraining. Since the two variants use different base models, we present them as complementary case studies: explicit context passing provides a strong training-free baseline for surface consistency, while implicit gated projection delivers significant planning-stage semantic gains, suggesting domain adaptation as a plausible next ingredient for full-spectrum improvement.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了两种跨阶段上下文传递机制在自动驾驶图视觉问答中的应用：显式变体通过提示策略实现无训练基线，隐式变体通过门控投影器实现语义提升。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶图视觉问答需要保持感知、预测、规划三个阶段的一致性，但模型在不同阶段的决策可能存在矛盾，需要有效的跨阶段信息传递机制来确保规划决策与感知结果的连贯性。
AI.method: 采用互补的两种机制：显式变体基于提示策略在领域适配的4B VLM上实现无训练；隐式变体引入门控投影器，提取隐藏状态向量并注入下一阶段输入，在通用8B VLM上联合训练仅更新0.5%参数。
AI.result: 显式变体减少NLI矛盾达42.6%，建立强零训练基线；隐式变体显著减少规划阶段矛盾34%，跨阶段蕴含增加50%，规划语言质量提升30.3%，但词汇重叠和结构一致性因缺少驾驶领域预训练而下降。
AI.conclusion: 两种变体作为互补案例研究：显式上下文传递提供表观一致性的训练免费基线，隐式门控投影实现显著的语义提升，表明领域适配是实现全面改进的合理下一步。

title: FlowAnchor: Stabilizing the Editing Signal for Inversion-Free Video Editing
summary: We propose FlowAnchor, a training-free framework for stable and efficient inversion-free, flow-based video editing. Inversion-free editing methods have recently shown impressive efficiency and structure preservation in images by directly steering the sampling trajectory with an editing signal. However, extending this paradigm to videos remains challenging, often failing in multi-object scenes or with increased frame counts. We identify the root cause as the instability of the editing signal in high-dimensional video latent spaces, which arises from imprecise spatial localization and length-induced magnitude attenuation. To overcome this challenge, FlowAnchor explicitly anchors both where to edit and how strongly to edit. It introduces Spatial-aware Attention Refinement, which enforces consistent alignment between textual guidance and spatial regions, and Adaptive Magnitude Modulation, which adaptively preserves sufficient editing strength. Together, these mechanisms stabilize the editing signal and guide the flow-based evolution toward the desired target distribution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FlowAnchor achieves more faithful, temporally coherent, and computationally efficient video editing across challenging multi-object and fast-motion scenarios. The project page is available at https://cuc-mipg.github.io/FlowAnchor.github.io/.

AI.tldr: FlowAnchor是一个免训练的基于流的视频编辑框架，通过空间感知注意细化信号定位和自适应幅度调制信号强度，解决了高维视频空间中的编辑信号不稳定问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的免反演编辑方法在图像编辑中表现优异，但扩展到视频时面临挑战，特别是在多物体场景和帧数增加的情况下，主要原因是高维视频潜在空间中编辑信号的不稳定性，包括空间定位不精确和长度引起的幅度衰减。
AI.method: FlowAnchor框架包含两个关键机制：1) 空间感知注意细化(Spatial-aware Attention Refinement)，强制文本引导与空间区域的一致对齐；2) 自适应幅度调制(Adaptive Magnitude Modulation)，自适应保持足够的编辑强度。这两个机制共同稳定编辑信号，引导基于流的演化朝向目标分布。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，FlowAnchor在具有挑战性的多物体和快速运动场景中，实现了更忠实、时间连贯且计算高效的视频编辑效果。
AI.conclusion: FlowAnchor通过精确定位编辑位置和自适应调节编辑强度，成功解决了视频编辑中的信号不稳定性问题，为免反演的基于流视频编辑提供了一个稳定高效的解决方案。

title: EV-CLIP: Efficient Visual Prompt Adaptation for CLIP in Few-shot Action Recognition under Visual Challenges
summary: CLIP has demonstrated strong generalization in visual domains through natural language supervision, even for video action recognition. However, most existing approaches that adapt CLIP for action recognition have primarily focused on temporal modeling, often overlooking spatial perception. In real-world scenarios, visual challenges such as low-light environments or egocentric viewpoints can severely impair spatial understanding, an essential precursor for effective temporal reasoning. To address this limitation, we propose Efficient Visual Prompting for CLIP (EV-CLIP), an efficient adaptation framework designed for few-shot video action recognition across diverse scenes and viewpoints. EV-CLIP introduces two visual prompts: mask prompts, which guide the model's attention to action-relevant regions by reweighting pixels, and context prompts, which perform lightweight temporal modeling by compressing frame-wise features into a compact representation. For a comprehensive evaluation, we curate five benchmark datasets and analyze domain shifts to quantify the influence of diverse visual and semantic factors on action recognition. Experimental results demonstrate that EV-CLIP outperforms existing parameter-efficient methods in overall performance. Moreover, its efficiency remains independent of the backbone scale, making it well-suited for deployment in real-world, resource-constrained scenarios. The code is available at https://github.com/AI-CV-Lab/EV-CLIP.

AI.tldr: EV-CLIP是一种高效的视频动作识别框架，通过引入mask提示和context提示来增强CLIP的空间感知和轻量级时序建模能力，在多场景少样本任务中表现优异且效率与主干网络规模无关。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CLIP的视频动作识别方法主要关注时序建模而忽视空间感知，但在真实场景中，低光照、第一人称视角等视觉挑战会严重影响空间理解，进而阻碍有效的时序推理。
AI.method: 提出EV-CLIP框架，包含两种视觉提示：1) mask提示通过重新加权像素引导模型关注动作相关区域；2) context提示通过压缩帧级特征实现轻量级时序建模。同时构建了五个基准数据集评估域偏移影响。
AI.result: 实验表明EV-CLIP在整体性能上超越现有参数高效方法，且效率与主干网络规模无关，适合在资源受限的真实场景中部署。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了CLIP适应视频动作识别时空间感知不足的问题，通过高效的双提示设计实现了跨场景跨视角的强泛化能力，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: A Non-Invasive Alternative to RFID: Self-Sufficient 3D Identification of Group-Housed Livestock
summary: Accurate identification of individual farm animals in group-housed environments is a cornerstone of precision livestock management. However, current industry standards rely heavily on Radio Frequency Identification (RFID) ear tags, which are invasive, prone to loss, and restricted by the spatial limitations of antenna fields. In this paper, we propose a non-intrusive, vision-based identification system leveraging 3D point cloud data captured within a commercial electronic feeding station (EFS). Departing from traditional supervised frame-level inference, we introduce the Temporal Adaptive Recognition Architecture (TARA), a self-sufficient, semi-supervised framework designed to maintain identity consistency over time. TARA employs a dynamic recalibration mechanism that updates individual identity profiles to account for morphological changes in the livestock. To facilitate training in label-scarce environments, we utilize a visit-level majority voting strategy to generate high-fidelity pseudo-labels from raw temporal sequences. Experimental results on a group housed sow dataset collected from an operational commercial barn demonstrate that our approach achieves 100% identification accuracy at the visit level. These results suggest that vision-based 3D point cloud analysis offers a robust, superior alternative to RFID-based systems, paving the way for fully autonomous individual animal monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D点云数据的非侵入式视觉识别系统TARA，用于精确识别群体饲养环境中的农场动物，实现了100%的访视级别识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统的RFID耳标签识系统存在侵入性、易丢失和天线场空间限制等问题，需要开发一种非侵入、更可靠的个体动物识别方案来支撑精准畜牧管理。
AI.method: 设计Temporal Adaptive Recognition Architecture (TARA)半监督框架，利用动态校准机制更新个体身份档案以适应牲畜形态变化，并采用访视级别多数投票策略生成高保真伪标签解决标签稀缺问题。
AI.result: 在实际商业猪舍收集的群居母猪数据集上实现了100%的访视级别识别准确率，证明了视觉3D点云分析的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 基于视觉的3D点云分析为RFID系统提供了稳健的替代方案，为实现完全自主的个体动物监测铺平了道路，在精准畜牧业具有重要应用前景。

title: PASR: Pose-Aware 3D Shape Retrieval from Occluded Single Views
summary: Single-view 3D shape retrieval is a fundamental yet challenging task that is increasingly important with the growth of available 3D data. Existing approaches largely fall into two categories: those using contrastive learning to map point cloud features into existing vision-language spaces and those that learn a common embedding space for 2D images and 3D shapes. However, these feed-forward, holistic alignments are often difficult to interpret, which in turn limits their robustness and generalization to real-world applications. To address this problem, we propose Pose-Aware 3D Shape Retrieval (PASR), a framework that formulates retrieval as a feature-level analysis-by-synthesis problem by distilling knowledge from a 2D foundation model (DINOv3) into a 3D encoder. By aligning pose-conditioned 3D projections with 2D feature maps, our method bridges the gap between real-world images and synthetic meshes. During inference, PASR performs a test-time optimization via analysis-by-synthesis, jointly searching for the shape and pose that best reconstruct the patch-level feature map of the input image. This synthesis-based optimization is inherently robust to partial occlusion and sensitive to fine-grained geometric details. PASR substantially outperforms existing methods on both clean and occluded 3D shape retrieval datasets by a wide margin. Additionally, PASR demonstrates strong multi-task capabilities, achieving robust shape retrieval, competitive pose estimation, and accurate category classification within a single framework.

AI.tldr: PASR是一种通过姿势感知的3D形状检索框架，将检索转化为特征级分析-合成问题，在干净和遮挡数据集上均显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的单视图3D形状检索方法主要使用对比学习或学习共同的嵌入空间，但这些前馈的整体对齐方法难以解释，限制了其在真实应用中的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出姿势感知3D形状检索(PASR)框架，将2D基础模型(DINOv3)的知识提炼到3D编码器中，通过姿势条件的3D投影与2D特征图对齐。推理时通过分析-合成进行测试时优化，联合搜索最佳重构输入图像块级特征图的形状和姿势。
AI.result: PASR在干净和遮挡的3D形状检索数据集上均大幅超越现有方法，同时展现出强大的多任务能力，包括鲁棒形状检索、竞争性姿态估计和准确类别分类。
AI.conclusion: PASR通过分析-合成优化方法解决了现有检索方法的解释性问题，实现了对部分遮挡的鲁棒性和对细粒度几何细节的敏感性，为单视图3D形状检索提供了更有效的解决方案。

title: SS3D: End2End Self-Supervised 3D from Web Videos
summary: We present SS3D, a web-scale SfM-based self-supervision pretraining pipeline for feed-forward 3D estimation from monocular video. Our model jointly predicts depth, ego-motion, and intrinsics in a single forward pass and is trained/evaluated as a coherent end-to-end 3D estimator. To stabilize joint learning, we use an intrinsics-first two-stage schedule and a unified single-checkpoint evaluation protocol. Scaling SfM self-supervision to unconstrained web video is challenging due to weak multi-view observability and strong corpus heterogeneity; we address these with a multi-view signal proxy (MVS) used for filtering and curriculum sampling, and with expert training distilled into a single student. Pretraining on YouTube-8M (~100M frames after filtering) yields strong cross-domain zero-shot transfer and improved fine-tuning performance over prior self-supervised baselines. We release the pretrained checkpoint and code.

AI.tldr: SS3D是一个基于SfM的网页级自监督预训练管道，用于从单目视频中进行前馈3D估计，在YouTube-8M数据集上预训练后展现出强大的跨域零样本迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 将SfM自监督学习扩展到不受约束的网页视频是一个挑战，主要由于弱多视图可观察性和语料库的强异质性。现有方法在处理大规模多样化视频数据时存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出SS3D管道，采用单次前向传播联合预测深度、自运动和内参。使用内参优先的两阶段调度和统一单检查点评估协议来稳定联合学习。通过多视图信号代理(MVS)进行过滤和课程采样，并将专家训练蒸馏到单个学生模型中。
AI.result: 在过滤后的YouTube-8M数据集(~1亿帧)上预训练后，模型相比现有自监督基线展现出更强的跨域零样本迁移性能和改进的微调性能。
AI.conclusion: SS3D成功解决了网页级视频SfM自监督学习的关键挑战，证明了大规模多模态预训练在3D估计任务上的有效性，为单目视频3D理解提供了新的解决方案。

title: Generative Modeling of Neurodegenerative Brain Anatomy with 4D Longitudinal Diffusion Model
summary: Understanding and predicting the progression of neurodegenerative diseases remains a major challenge in medical AI, with significant implications for early diagnosis, disease monitoring, and treatment planning. However, most available longitudinal neuroimaging datasets are temporally sparse with a few follow-up scans per subject. This scarcity of temporal data limits our ability to model and accurately capture the continuous anatomical changes related to disease progression in individual subjects. To address this problem, we propose a novel 4D (3DxT) diffusion-based generative framework that effectively models and synthesizes longitudinal brain anatomy over time, conditioned on available clinical variables such as health status, age, sex, and other relevant factors. Moreover, while most current approaches focus on manipulating image intensity or texture, our method explicitly learns the data distribution of topology-preserving spatiotemporal deformations to effectively capture the geometric changes of brain structures over time. This design enables the realistic generation of future anatomical states and the reconstruction of anatomically consistent disease trajectories, providing a more faithful representation of longitudinal brain changes. We validate our model through both synthetic sequence generation and downstream longitudinal disease classification, as well as brain segmentation. Experiments on two large-scale longitudinal neuroimage datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in generating anatomically accurate, temporally consistent, and clinically meaningful brain trajectories. Our code is available on Github.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于4D扩散的生成框架，能够根据临床变量生成纵向脑部解剖序列，在稀疏时间数据情况下有效建模神经退行性疾病的进展。
AI.motivation: 现有纵向神经影像数据时间点稀疏，限制了准确建模个体连续解剖变化的能力，这对神经退行性疾病的早期诊断和监测带来了挑战。
AI.method: 开发了一种4D(3DxT)扩散生成框架，通过学习拓扑保持的时空变形数据分布，结合健康状态、年龄、性别等临床变量作为条件，生成纵向脑部解剖序列。
AI.result: 在两个大型纵向神经影像数据集上的实验表明，该方法在生成解剖准确、时间一致且具有临床意义的脑部轨迹方面优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够生成合理的未来解剖状态和重建解剖一致的疾病轨迹，为纵向脑部变化提供了更逼真的表示，在疾病分类和脑部分割等下游任务中表现出色。

title: Long-tail Internet photo reconstruction
summary: Internet photo collections exhibit an extremely long-tailed distribution: a few famous landmarks are densely photographed and easily reconstructed in 3D, while most real-world sites are represented with sparse, noisy, uneven imagery beyond the capabilities of both classical and learned 3D methods. We believe that tackling this long-tail regime represents one of the next frontiers for 3D foundation models. Although reliable ground-truth 3D supervision from sparse scenes is challenging to acquire, we observe that it can be effectively simulated by sampling sparse subsets from well-reconstructed Internet landmarks. To this end, we introduce MegaDepth-X, a large dataset of 3D reconstructions with clean, dense depth, together with a strategy for sampling sets of training images that mimic camera distributions in long-tail scenes. Finetuning 3D foundation models with these components yields robust reconstructions under extreme sparsity, and also enables more reliable reconstruction in symmetric and repetitive scenes, while preserving generalization to standard, dense 3D benchmark datasets.

AI.tldr: 针对互联网照片长尾分布问题，提出MegaDepth-X数据集，通过采样策略模拟稀疏场景相机分布，显著提升了3D基础模型在极端稀疏条件下的重建能力。
AI.motivation: 互联网照片呈现长尾分布：少数著名地标容易3D重建，而大多数真实场景因图像稀疏、噪声大而难以重建，这是3D基础模型需要解决的重要挑战。
AI.method: 提出MegaDepth-X数据集，包含干净密集的3D重建深度图，并设计了模拟长尾场景相机分布的训练图像采样策略。
AI.result: 微调后的3D基础模型在极端稀疏条件下实现鲁棒重建，同时在对称和重复场景中重建更可靠，且保持对标准密集3D基准数据集的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过合成稀疏训练数据和智能采样策略，可以有效解决3D重建的长尾问题，为3D基础模型在稀疏场景下的应用提供了新思路。

title: Inter-Stance: A Dyadic Multimodal Corpus for Conversational Stance Analysis
summary: Social interactions dominate our perceptions of the world and shape our daily behavior by attaching social meaning to acts as simple and spontaneous as gestures, facial expressions, voice, and speech. People mimic and otherwise respond to each other's postures, facial expressions, mannerisms, and other verbal and nonverbal behavior, and form appraisals or evaluations in the process. Yet, no publicly-available dataset includes multimodal recordings and self-report measures of multiple persons in social interaction. Dyadic recordings and annotation are lacking. We present a new data corpus of multimodal dyadic interaction (45 dyads, 90 persons) that includes synchronized multi-modality behavior (2D face video, 3D face geometry, thermal spectrum dynamics, voice and speech behavior, physiology (PPG, EDA, heart-rate, blood pressure, and respiration), and self-reported affect of all participants in a communicative interaction scenario. Two types of dyads are included: persons with shared past history and strangers. Annotations include social signals, agreement, disagreement, and neutral stance. With a potent emotion induction, these multimodal data will enable novel modeling of multimodal interpersonal behavior. We present extensive experiments to evaluate multimodal dyadic communication of dyads with and without interpersonal history, and their affect. This new database will make multimodal modeling of social interaction never possible before. The dataset includes 20TB of multimodal data to share with the research community.

AI.tldr: 研究团队创建了一个包含45对人(90人)的多模态互动数据集，涵盖视频、语音、生理信号等多维度数据，用于研究社交互动中的行为和情感。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏公开的多模态社交互动数据集，特别是包含多个参与者的同步记录和自我报告测量，这限制了社交行为建模研究的发展。
AI.method: 建立了包含熟人组和陌生组的双人互动数据库，收集同步的多模态数据(2D面部视频、3D面部几何、热成像、语音、生理信号、情感自我报告)，并对社交信号、同意/反对/中立等进行标注。
AI.result: 生成了20TB的多模态互动数据集，通过广泛的实验验证了有无人际历史的双人沟通模式和情感差异的分析效果。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了多模态社交互动研究的空白，为前所未有的社交行为建模研究提供了重要资源，将推动该领域的创新发展。
